task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the OpenSIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS login screen with credentials entered, or the OpenSIS dashboard indicating a successful login as admin.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the student record for 'Robert Transfer'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS interface showing the student profile or search results specifically for 'Robert Transfer'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the document or file upload section for the student.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A section, tab, or modal within Robert Transfer's profile dedicated to uploading files or managing documents.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct transcript file from the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The system file picker showing '/home/ga/Desktop/transcript_source.pdf' selected, or the file name 'transcript_source.pdf' visible in the browser's file upload input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the file upload was completed successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the upload, or 'transcript_source.pdf' visibly listed under the student's uploaded files/documents.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to access OpenSIS.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open and displaying the OpenSIS web interface, rather than terminal commands interacting with the server.

integrity.description: Verify the file was uploaded using the graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a GUI file picker dialog or browser file input interaction, rather than terminal commands moving or copying the file.

integrity.description: Verify the upload targets the correct student.
integrity.visual_evidence: The name 'Robert Transfer' is visible on the same screen or context where the file upload is taking place, ensuring it wasn't uploaded to a different student.

privileged_info_for_vlm: OpenSIS admin credentials: Username: admin, Password: Admin@123. Student name: Robert Transfer. File to upload: 'transcript_source.pdf' located at '/home/ga/Desktop/'.
